final_prompt.prompt:
Create an infographic explaining the definitions and relationships between AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, distillation, and CLI, designed for easy comprehension with hand-drawn illustration style.

Style/medium: hand-drawn infographic with the approachable warmth of sketched diagrams and illustrated annotations, designed for educational clarity
Composition: central concept map with AI as the root node, connected branches showing relationships between all seven concepts, callout boxes for definitions, visual flow arrows indicating dependencies and hierarchies
Subject: seven concept nodes — AI (artificial intelligence foundation), MCP (Model Context Protocol), AI Agent (autonomous agent), OpenClaw (open framework/tool), AI Skill (modular capability), distillation (knowledge compression), CLI (command-line interface) — with connecting relationship lines and brief illustrated definitions
Scene/backdrop: clean white or cream paper background with subtle sketch texture, generous margin space for visual breathing room
Lighting/mood: the warm clarity of a teacher's whiteboard explanation, inviting curiosity and understanding
Color palette: warm graphite and soft ink tones with gentle accent colors for concept categories — blues for technical protocols, greens for frameworks, amber for processes
Materials/textures: pencil sketch lines with watercolor wash accents, the tactile honesty of hand-drawn diagrams on paper
Text (verbatim): AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI — all concept labels preserved exactly as provided
Constraints: all seven concepts must be visible and labeled, relationships between concepts must be visually indicated, definitions must be concise and illustrated, hand-drawn aesthetic must be consistent throughout
Avoid: sterile corporate diagram aesthetic, overly dense text blocks, confusing relationship arrows, photorealistic rendering, 8K/masterpiece stuffer language
